name: LNG Train Standard
description: Default packaging rules for LNG Train maintenance plans

rules.description: Group tasks by asset hierarchy level (1=Train, 2=System, 3=Sub-system, 4=Equipment)
Split task list items when total duration exceeds cap
Separate online and offline (shutdown) tasks into different items
Isolate regulatory/statutory tasks into dedicated plan items
Separate tasks by type (Inspection, Lubrication, PM, CM) into distinct items
Isolate high-criticality (A-class) tasks into dedicated plan items
Split task list items when operation count exceeds cap (0 = disabled)
